mapper.select:
SELECT
, FROM HC_MEMBER hm INNER JOIN HC_MEMBER_ROLE hmr on hm.MEM_ID = hmr.MEM_ID INNER JOIN HC_ROLE hr on hmr.ROLE_ID = hr.ROLE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND (hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'unused') AND hr.ROLE_TYPE = 'login' AND hm.MEM_ID = #{userId}

SELECT
FROM HC_MEMBER hm WHERE 1=1 AND hm.MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND hm.MEM_ID = #{userId}
SELECT MEM_FAIL_CNT FROM HC_MEMBER WHERE 1=1 AND MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
mapper.update: UPDATE HC_MEMBER SET MEM_FAIL_CNT = 0 , MEM_FAIL_DT = SYSDATE() WHERE 1=1 AND MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
UPDATE HC_MEMBER SET MEM_FAIL_CNT = IFNULL(MEM_FAIL_CNT, 0) + 1 , MEM_FAIL_DT = SYSDATE() WHERE 1=1 AND MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
UPDATE HC_MEMBER SET MEM_COLUMN3 = #{auth} WHERE 1=1 AND MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND MEM_ID = #{memId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM HC_MEMBER WHERE 1=1 AND MEM_STAT != 'delete' AND MEM_COLUMN3 = 'SUPER'
